name: Overseerr
description: Media request management. Let friends request movies and TV shows.

steps.instruction: Click 'Sign in with Plex' (or Jellyfin if you chose that). Sign in with your media server account. This becomes the admin account
Configure Plex: Settings (left sidebar) → Plex → set Server URL to http://plex:32400 → click 'Test' (green checkmark) → Save. For Jellyfin: set URL to http://jellyfin:8096

Connect Radarr: Settings → Radarr → click 'Add Radarr Server'. Set: Server Name = Radarr, Hostname = radarr, Port = 7878, API Key = paste the RADARR API key you copied when setting up Radarr earlier. Click 'Test' → select a Quality Profile and Root Folder (/movies) → Save

Connect Sonarr: Settings → Sonarr → click 'Add Sonarr Server'. Set: Server Name = Sonarr, Hostname = sonarr, Port = 8989, API Key = paste the SONARR API key you copied when setting up Sonarr earlier. Click 'Test' → select Quality Profile and Root Folder (/tv) → Save
Settings → General → scroll down to find the API Key. Copy it
